instrument: N/A -- catalog metadata, not an image/photometric instrument
cadence: N/A -- static catalog snapshot, not a time-series acquisition
band_or_frequency: N/A -- catalog metadata (designation, class, absolute magnitude H), not a photometric band
data_product_type: MPC-confirmed object class labels (neo_candidate/main_belt_asteroid) with designation and absolute magnitude H, used as Tier 1 XGBoost training labels alongside data/ztf_labeled_alerts.json real/bogus features
downloaded_at: 2026-06-06T02:26:00-0400 (local filesystem mtime of data/training_labels.csv; no separate download-timestamp log exists)
license: Not independently verified in project records. MPC publishes minor planet catalog data for public research use; no explicit license file or terms-of-use document was located during this manifest's creation.
label_source: Minor Planet Center confirmed/numbered object catalog (astroquery.mpc or equivalent), split evenly into confirmed-NEO and confirmed-main-belt-asteroid classes
preprocessing_version: Skills/generate_training_labels.py (or equivalent MPC label-generation path); consumed directly as --mpc-labels by Skills/train_tier1_xgboost.py alongside data/ztf_labeled_alerts.json (see ztf_labeled_alerts_tier2_cnn_v1.json manifest) to produce models/tier1_xgb.json
known_caveats: This is the real, committed-code-produced MPC label source for the trained Tier 1 XGBoost model (models/tier1_xgb.json, val_acc=99.95%, macro AUC=1.000 per T1-A), but the raw CSV file itself is gitignored/local-only and is not in git history.

Confirmed real class balance by direct inspection 2026-07-11: exactly 500 neo_candidate rows (source=MPC_NEA) and 500 main_belt_asteroid rows (source=MPC_MBA), matching the documented 1000-label split in CLAUDE.md's T1-A section.

No per-object observation epoch, orbit-fit date, or MPC query timestamp was preserved in this cached file -- only designation, neo_class, h_mag, and source per row -- so time_range cannot be reconstructed and is recorded as 'unknown' rather than guessed.

Per project label-quality policy, only MPC-numbered/confirmed objects should be treated as high-confidence positives; this file's label_confidence is recorded as 'confirmed' on that basis, consistent with the source column values (MPC_NEA/MPC_MBA).
